compile_shader_zero_copy._note: Phase 4 compile_shader fast-path: ON=TRITON_MSL_COMPILE_SHADER=1 (default), OFF=0. Measured 2026-06-14 on M4 Max (peak 546 GB/s). Reduction is pass-1 scatter-sum (each block→OUT[pid]), not global atomic.

flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32.name: flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32
flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32._note: MEASURED on M4 Max via an integration microbenchmark of the shipped make_flash_attention_kernel_simdgroup (loop-split kernel; warmup + median over 50 iters). NOT yet a committed hw_harness regression benchmark. Correctness verified by the 12-case differential gate (simd==scalar==torch). Throughput scales with N_CTX. NOT competitive with Apple metal-flash-attention / MLX in absolute terms.
